description_long: This handbag features a rectangular, boxy shape with a woven exterior in a pastel color palette of light pink, lavender, and pale green. The woven pattern forms a diamond lattice design, giving the bag a textured and artisanal appearance. The edges are reinforced with a solid pink trim, providing structure and a neat finish. A thin wrist strap, also in pink, is attached to one side, allowing for easy carrying. The bag appears to have a zipper closure along the top edge, ensuring the contents are secure. The overall look is both functional and stylish, suitable for casual urban outings.
description: A rectangular woven handbag with a pastel diamond pattern, pink trim, and a thin wrist strap. It features a zipper closure and a textured, artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full diamond-patterned woven surface, pink trim, and attached wrist strap on the left.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim profile of the handbag and the thickness of the woven material.
description_view_2: Back view revealing the same diamond-patterned woven surface and pink trim, with the wrist strap now on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and the attachment point of the wrist strap.
attribute_strap_type: single thin wrist strap, short length, non-adjustable, attached at one side
attribute_closure_mechanism: zipper closure along the top edge
attribute_pattern: diamond lattice woven pattern in pastel colors
